title: feat(daemon): wire resolve_for_cwd into dispatch
body:
## Summary
- Resolve per-request layered config in `dispatch()` via `config::resolve_for_cwd(state.baseline(), &req.cwd, None)`; merge/discovery errors surface as `DaemonResponse::Err { kind: InvalidParams, .. }` instead of silently falling back to the baseline.
- Refactor `effective_corpora` to take `&Config` and thread the resolved config through every handler (`handle_ground/handle_index/handle_list_corpora/handle_list_files/handle_add_markdown/handle_read_markdown/handle_delete_markdown`).
- Add three `#[tokio::test]` cases pinning AC #2 from `.cheese/specs/repo-config-discovery.md`: a valid cwd returns `Ok` for `Ping`, a `.git`-less / config-less ancestry returns `InvalidParams`, and a baseline/repo scalar conflict on `embeddings.cache_dir` returns `InvalidParams` with the offending field named.

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo check --all-targets`
- [x] `cargo test --lib app::daemon::dispatch::tests` (7 passed)
